# Title: Amazon Luxury program terms

Title: Amazon Luxury program terms

URL Source: https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/GAXRKKBPHJZD93MS

Markdown Content:
This article applies to selling in: **United States**

On this page

[Premium customer experience](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/GAXRKKBPHJZD93MS#wjz_cjc_jcb)

[Brand Registry requirements](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/GAXRKKBPHJZD93MS#mnd_2jc_jcb-7)

## Eligibility

Amazon Luxury is an invite-only program for brand owners and authorized distributors.

## Premium customer experience

Amazon Luxury is intended to provide customers with a premium shopping experience dedicated to luxury products, where customers can find a broad selection that they feel confident is authentic, and compelling visual content that highlights brands and their products. To achieve this customer experience, you and Amazon have the following obligations:

*   Your luxury products will be available for sale on Amazon Luxury. **Luxury products** are products eligible for Amazon Luxury that you offer for sale through any distribution or sales channel. They do not include excluded products and products that you are prohibited by Law, contract or the manufacturer, vendor or licensor from offering through Amazon, provided that you have not encouraged any related prohibition.
*   Amazon will provide you a dedicated webpage for your brand within Amazon Luxury known as **Brand Store** for you to populate visual content.
*   You will provide visual content, such as videos, runway imagery, and on-model product images to populate your Brand Store and to market and promote your Brand Store through Amazon.

## Referral fee

For each luxury product sold, the following fees apply:

| Luxury product category | Base referral fee | Premium experience fee | Total fee |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Fashion | 15% | 5% | 20% |
| Beauty | 15% | 15% | 30% |

**Note:**Items that are sold on Amazon.co.uk, Amazon.it, Amazon.es, and Amazon.fr are subject to the Digital Service Tax. As a result, the above referral fees will increase by 2% for items sold on Amazon.co.uk and 3% for items sold on Amazon.it, Amazon.es, or Amazon.fr. To calculate the increase on percentage-based referral fees rates, add 2% or 3% (depending on the Amazon store on which the item is sold) to the absolute fee amount.

## Subscription fee

There is a one-time subscription fee associated with setting up your Selling on Amazon service for Amazon Luxury, which Amazon will waive following initial setup.

## Fulfillment

You will fulfill customer orders through Fulfillment by Amazon (FBA), seller fulfillment, or both.

## Fulfillment

You will fulfill customer orders through Fulfillment by Amazon (FBA), seller fulfillment, or both.

If you use Fulfillment by Amazon, the standard FBA fees apply to Luxury Products. Amazon will waive FBA return processing fees and FBA order removal fees for Luxury Products in Fashion. Amazon will charge FBA order removal fees for Luxury Products in Beauty. For more information, go to [FBA features, services, and fees](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/G201074400).

If you choose seller fulfillment, you must agree to the following requirements:

1.   Free shipping for customers: 

    1.   You will provide free two-day shipping for all addresses in the continental U.S.
    2.   You will provide free expedited shipping for addresses in Alaska, Hawaii, and U.S. protectorates, PO boxes in the continental US, and APO/FPO addresses.

2.   You will [use buy shipping services](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/G200202220) or submit shipment confirmation and valid tracking numbers for each Luxury Products order.
3.   We may display a guaranteed delivery date message for all seller-fulfilled products eligible for two-day shipping. If customers contact Amazon Luxury [customer service](https://www.amazon.com/lux/chat/?_encoding=UTF8&ref_=sv__8) about a late seller-fulfilled delivery that had the two-day shipping message, we may provide customers a refund or credit and charge your account for any such customer refund or credit.
4.   If you will be unavailable to ship Luxury Products for any period of time, you will immediately inform your brand manager.
5.   You will meet the following performance metrics:

    1.   ≥ 99% on-time shipment rate
    2.   ≥ 99% valid tracking rate
    3.   ≤ 0.5% order cancellation rate
    4.   ≥ 97% on-time delivery rate

## Customer service

## Customer service

*   You must respond to any inquiries from Amazon Luxury [customer service](https://www.amazon.com/lux/chat/?_encoding=UTF8&ref_=sv__8) within 24 hours on weekdays and by the next business day on weekends and holidays.
*   You must monitor any inquiries that come from customers through Buyer-Seller Messaging Service in Seller Central and forward them to [luxurystores-operations@amazon.com](mailto:luxurystores-operations@amazon.com) and notify the customer about this.
*   Amazon will address pre-order customer contacts but we will route inquiries to you if we determine additional expertise is required.
*   Amazon will address FBA order related contacts.
*   For seller-fulfilled orders, Amazon Luxury customer service team will engage with the customer on your behalf, but you must agree to take order-related actions when requested by Amazon Luxury.

## Returns

All luxury products are subject to the return requirements listed below.

Item Policy or requirement
Amazon Luxury return policy You will comply with the return requirements under this program policy and the [Amazon Luxury returns policy](https://www.amazon.com/gp/help/customer/display.html?nodeId=GKM69DUUYKQWKWX7). Customers must receive free returns for all luxury products.
General return expectation Customers that request to return a luxury product under the [Amazon Luxury returns policy](https://www.amazon.com/gp/help/customer/display.html?nodeId=GKM69DUUYKQWKWX7) during the applicable return window will have their return approved immediately and will receive a pre-paid return mailing label.
Seller-fulfilled return shipping location All returns of Amazon Luxury items will be shipped to the return address provided in your [account settings](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/hz/sc/account-information).
Seller-fulfilled charges for the return mailing label You will be responsible for the cost of return mailing labels for all products.

Seller-fulfilled charges for the return mailing label You will be responsible for the cost of return mailing labels for all products.
Seller-fulfilled refund processing time All returned luxury products must be processed and refunded within two business days of the item arriving in your designated return location.
Refund amount If the returned luxury products meet the conditions specified in the Amazon Luxury return policy or elsewhere under this program policy, you must provide a full refund to the customer and not charge a restocking fee.
Delivery refunds If a customer complains of not receiving delivery of a luxury product when the package tracking information indicates it was "delivered," they should be directed to Amazon Luxury customer service.

Unreturnable items Most Luxury Products that are classified as hazardous material also knows as hazmat, or potentially hazmat are not returnable by customers under the [Amazon Luxury return policy](https://www.amazon.com/gp/help/customer/display.html?nodeId=GKM69DUUYKQWKWX7#GUID-D26A35E8-EE23-4B88-8B62-B357ABA6DDEE__SECTION_9B81261CFF644587B71F771029910996). However, customers will be able to call Amazon Luxury [customer service](https://www.amazon.com/lux/chat/?_encoding=UTF8&ref_=sv__8) for a refund on these items and customer service may issue a refund for unreturnable items in its sole discretion. Amazon may charge the costs of any refunds to the seller's account. If you believe an item has been incorrectly classified as hazmat, contact your brand manager for assistance.
Customer returns exceptions To ensure a great customer experience, Amazon Luxury may make case-by-case exceptions to the return policies, including accepting returns for items past the stated returns time frame.

## Brand Registry requirements

You must enroll in Brand Registry and maintain an active Brand Registry account.

## Additional terms

If we determine that your actions or performance may result in harm to customer trust, violate any of our terms or policies, or cause other risks to customers or Amazon, then we may disable or remove applicable selling privileges or Amazon Luxury eligibility.

We may change the Amazon Luxury program policies from time to time, and any changes and notice of changes will be in accordance with the agreement.
